name: Dashibase
description: Dashibase — No-code internal dashboard builder with Supabase integration for CRUD operations on your data.

seo.title: Dashibase — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Dashibase: Dashibase — No-code internal dashboard builder with Supabase integration for CRUD operations on your data.

when_to_use: Internal admin panel on top of Supabase tables with CRUD
Customer management dashboard without writing React code
Operations tool with role-based views over Supabase data
Support team portal with read-write access to user records
Rapid prototype of a data-heavy internal app in hours

cons: Smaller ecosystem than Retool or Internal
review.verdict: Good niche pick if your data lives in Supabase — otherwise Retool or Internal.io offer more flexibility.
review.best_for: Supabase-first startups needing quick CRUD dashboards without boilerplate
review.not_for: Teams on Postgres, MySQL, or MongoDB who need a broader tool palette
